name: Denali Therapeutics Inc.
description: Denali Therapeutics Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing a broad portfolio of product candidates designed to cross the blood-brain barrier (BBB) for the treatment of neurodegenerative diseases. Utilizing its proprietary Blood-Brain Barrier Delivery (TV) platform, the company aims to deliver therapeutic proteins, antibodies, enzymes, and synthetic small molecules to the brain. Denali's pipeline includes programs targeting Alzheimer's disease, Parkinson's disease, amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), and various lysosomal storage diseases.
